intro: Government, technology, education, telecommunications, and advertising sectors were the most affected in a recent wave of privacy-related incidents, with 19 articles published between April 12 and April 23, 2026. The coverage includes five high-severity and eight medium-severity issues, alongside six informational pieces. The top CVE identified was CVE-2026-28950. Affected regions spanned globally, with specific impact in the United States, Europe, Mexico, and the Netherlands.
